pricing.heading: What your tokens would have cost through the API
pricing.meta: EUR via ECB {fxDate} · API prices {pricingDate} · internal score {scoreDate}

messages.noGeminiLogs: No local Gemini usage logs found.
messages.noCopilotSessionMetrics: No local Copilot CLI session metrics found.
messages.claudeStatuslineNoQuotas: Claude is sending data, but not official Pro/Max limit values yet.
messages.claudeStatuslineMissing: Claude statusline not configured. Enable the dashboard statusline command for Pro/Max live quotas.
messages.claudeLiveLimitsMissing: Claude live limits are not available from local telemetry yet.
messages.claudeLimitsStale: Claude live limits are out of date. Open Claude Code once to refresh them.
messages.claudeBrowserLoginHint: Log in to Claude.ai in your browser to enable credit tracking.

emptyState.heading: No active usage
emptyState.message: All providers currently have no logged tokens or limit data.

updateDelayHints.default: This provider has not produced a fresh local signal for more than {minutes} minutes. Some sources only update when their CLI or app writes new usage data.
updateDelayHints.codex: Codex limits normally update through the local app-server. If this stays old, the app-server may be unavailable or Codex has not produced fresh live limit data.
updateDelayHints.codexSpark: Codex Spark limits normally update through the local Codex app-server. If this stays old, Spark live limit data may not be exposed yet.
updateDelayHints.claudeCode: This Claude Code card combines statusline, local logs, and Claude.ai billing or usage data. Updates can lag when Claude Code is closed, the statusline has not run, or Claude.ai cookies/API access are unavailable.
updateDelayHints.copilot: GitHub Copilot CLI usage is written after sessions shut down, and live quota probing depends on the local Copilot CLI. The timestamp can lag while a session is still open or the probe is unavailable.
updateDelayHints.gemini: Gemini local usage updates only when local log files contain new usage metadata.
updateDelayHints.ollama: Ollama usage updates only when requests pass through the dashboard's local proxy/log file.

labels.updatedHelp: Why this timestamp may be delayed

limits.fullPremiumRequestsDetail: {requests} premium requests from local session logs

notifications.title: Desktop notifications
notifications.description: Warning when a limit window is being consumed too quickly at the current pace.

sources.title: Local sources
sources.description: Manage connected sources, recheck access, and copy ACL commands for other local users.
sources.candidatesEmpty: No additional source candidates detected right now.
sources.connectSuccess: Source connected. Running a fresh diagnostics pass now.
sources.disableSuccess: Source disabled. Usage totals were refreshed.
sources.copyGrantSuccess: Grant commands copied to the clipboard.
sources.copyRevokeSuccess: Revoke commands copied to the clipboard.
sources.copyError: Could not copy commands to the clipboard.

connected_live.title: Connected and live
connected_live.body: At least one readable source is already connected and can contribute local usage data.

current_user_empty.title: Current user empty
current_user_empty.body: The app scanned the current desktop user successfully, but no local usage files with data were found yet.

candidates_readable_empty.title: Readable candidates found
candidates_readable_empty.body: Known tool folders are readable, but they currently look empty or have no token-bearing events.

candidates_denied.title: Access denied
candidates_denied.body: Plausible source folders were found under another local user, but this app cannot read them yet.

no_tools_found.title: No tools found
no_tools_found.body: No supported local tool folders, related processes, or service hints were detected on this machine.

other_dashboard_found.title: Other dashboard found
other_dashboard_found.body: Another local LLM Usage Dashboard instance is running and may already have access to usage data.

partial_unsupported.title: Partially supported
partial_unsupported.body: This runtime can only do limited source discovery, so some users, services, or homes may stay invisible.

discovery_error.title: Discovery error
discovery_error.body: Source discovery did not finish cleanly. Recheck access or inspect the backend error state.
